query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.departamentoId as depto_colaborador,
  u.leaderId as lider_superior,
  d.id as depto_liderado,
  CASE 
    WHEN u.departamentoId = d.id THEN 'CONFLITO: mesmo depto'
    WHEN u.departamentoId IS NOT NULL AND d.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'DUAL: departamentos diferentes'
    WHEN u.departamentoId IS NULL AND d.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'APENAS LIDER'
    ELSE 'SEM VÍNCULO'
  END as situacao
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON d.leaderId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
ORDER BY u.id;
